tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P2] Move CandidateCard to entities/discovery and enhance
tasks.description:
Move `CandidateCard` from `features/mesh/ui/` to `entities/discovery/ui/` as shared infrastructure. Enhance it with the `onSkip` prop and staggered entrance animation.

**File to create:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/discovery/ui/CandidateCard.tsx` (moved + enhanced from `features/mesh/ui/CandidateCard.tsx`)

**File to delete (after all consumers are updated):**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/CandidateCard.tsx`

**Enhancements:**

1. Add `onSkip` and `onDeny` as optional props:
```typescript
interface CandidateCardProps {
  candidate: DiscoveryCandidate;
  onApprove: (candidate: DiscoveryCandidate) => void;
  onDeny?: (candidate: DiscoveryCandidate) => void;
  onSkip?: (candidate: DiscoveryCandidate) => void;
}
```

2. Render buttons based on which callbacks are provided:
   - `onApprove` always shown (green "Approve" button)
   - `onDeny` shown as red "Deny" button when provided (mesh Discovery tab)
   - `onSkip` shown as subtle text button when provided (onboarding)
   - When both `onDeny` and `onSkip` are provided, show both

3. Wrap in `motion.div` with staggered entrance animation:
```typescript
<motion.div
  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
  exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -16 }}
  transition={{ duration: 0.25, ease: 'easeOut' }}
>
```

4. Keep existing HoverCard on runtime badge and per-capability Tooltips.

5. Export from `entities/discovery/index.ts` barrel.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `CandidateCard` lives in `entities/discovery/ui/`
- [ ] `onSkip` prop renders a subtle "Skip" button
- [ ] `onDeny` prop renders a red "Deny" button
- [ ] Both are optional — only `onApprove` is required
- [ ] Staggered entrance animation applied
- [ ] Exported from `entities/discovery/` barrel
- [ ] All existing CandidateCard features preserved (HoverCard, Tooltips)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P2] Update mesh panel DiscoveryView to use shared hook and CandidateCard
tasks.description:
Update the mesh panel's `DiscoveryView.tsx` to use the shared `useDiscoveryScan` hook and import `CandidateCard` from `entities/discovery/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/DiscoveryView.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/index.ts`

**File to delete:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/model/use-mesh-discover.ts` (or wherever `useDiscoverAgents` is defined)

**Changes to DiscoveryView.tsx:**

1. Replace imports:
```diff
- import { useDiscoverAgents, useMeshScanRoots, ... } from '@/layers/entities/mesh';
- import { CandidateCard } from './CandidateCard';
+ import { useDiscoveryScan, CandidateCard } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
+ import { useMeshScanRoots, ... } from '@/layers/entities/mesh';
```

2. Replace the `discover()` mutation with `scan()` from the shared hook.
3. Results now come from the Zustand store (progressive) instead of mutation response (batch).
4. Add progress display during scan.

**Update mesh entity barrel** (`entities/mesh/index.ts`):
- Remove `useDiscoverAgents` export

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Old `useDiscoverAgents` / `use-mesh-discover.ts` is deleted
- [ ] Mesh panel uses `useDiscoveryScan` from `entities/discovery/`
- [ ] `CandidateCard` imported from `entities/discovery/` (not local)
- [ ] Results stream progressively (candidates appear one-by-one)
- [ ] Scan roots from settings are passed through
- [ ] Progress indicator shows during scan
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Updating mesh panel to use shared discovery hook

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P3] Update onboarding AgentDiscoveryStep to use CandidateCard with approve/skip
tasks.description:
Replace the checkbox-selection model in onboarding with per-agent approve/skip using the shared `CandidateCard`.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/AgentDiscoveryStep.tsx`

**Changes:**

1. Replace imports:
```diff
- import { AgentCard } from './AgentCard';
+ import { CandidateCard, useDiscoveryScan } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
```

2. Remove checkbox selection state:
```diff
- const [selectedPaths, setSelectedPaths] = useState<Set<string> | null>(null);
+ const [actedPaths, setActedPaths] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
```

3. Remove `handleToggle`, bulk select/deselect logic, `computedSelected`.

4. Replace card rendering:
```diff
- <AgentCard
-   candidate={c}
-   selected={selected.has(c.path)}
-   onToggle={() => handleToggle(c.path)}
- />
+ <CandidateCard
+   candidate={c}
+   onApprove={(cand) => {
+     registerAgent({ path: cand.path }, { onSuccess: () => markActed(cand.path) });
+   }}
+   onSkip={(cand) => markActed(cand.path)}
+ />
```

5. Replace the batch "Register N agents" button with:
   - A "Continue" button that's always visible ("Skip remaining & continue")
   - Becomes primary/prominent when all candidates have been acted on
   - `visibleCandidates = candidates.filter(c => !actedPaths.has(c.path))`

6. Keep auto-start scan on mount.
7. Keep staggered entrance animations (now handled by CandidateCard's built-in animation).
8. Keep "No agents found" state with `NoAgentsFound` component.
9. Keep progress indicator.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] No checkbox selection model — each agent gets approve/skip
- [ ] Approved agents register immediately with success feedback
- [ ] Skipped agents disappear (session-local, no denial record)
- [ ] "Continue" button always visible, becomes primary when all acted on
- [ ] Auto-start scan on mount still works
- [ ] Progressive results with staggered animation still work
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Updating onboarding to use CandidateCard with approve/skip

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P4] Remove unused imports, types, and update documentation
tasks.description:
Final cleanup pass to remove stale references and update project documentation.

**Cleanup tasks:**

1. **Remove stale imports:** Run `pnpm typecheck` and fix any remaining import errors across the codebase. Search for:
   - References to `discovery-scanner` or `scanForAgents` (Scanner A)
   - References to `discovery-engine` or `scanDirectory` (Scanner B)
   - References to `ScanCandidate` (the old onboarding type)
   - References to `useDiscoverAgents` (the old mesh hook)
   - The old `use-discovery-scan.ts` in onboarding
   - References to `OnboardingAgentCard` or `DiscoverAgentsSection`
   - References to deleted onboarding `AgentCard`

2. **Remove stale type definitions:** If the old `ScanCandidate` interface or `DiscoveryCandidate` from Scanner A still exists in any file, remove it.

3. **Update `AGENTS.md`:**
   - In the services list, remove the `discovery-scanner.ts` entry
   - Add `entities/discovery/` to the FSD layers table with columns: `entities/discovery/` | `useDiscoveryStore, useDiscoveryScan, CandidateCard` | `Shared discovery scan state and card component`
   - Update the `discovery-engine.ts` reference to point to the new `packages/mesh/src/discovery/` directory
   - Update the discovery route description to mention meshCore dependency

4. **Update `contributing/architecture.md`:**
   - Document the unified discovery system
   - Mention the Transport `scan()` method
   - Note that scan results are shared across features via Zustand store
   - Document the single discovery interaction model (CandidateCard with approve/deny/skip)

5. **Verify all tests pass:**
   ```bash
   pnpm test -- --run
   pnpm typecheck
   pnpm lint
   ```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] No references to deleted files remain in the codebase
- [ ] No unused type definitions remain
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated with new entity and corrected service references
- [ ] `contributing/architecture.md` updated
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (or only pre-existing warnings)
tasks.activeForm: Removing unused imports and updating documentation
